alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing the polyaromatic chrysene moiety, which consists of a benzene ring fused to a phenanthrene ring system to form Benzo[a]phenanthrene.
alternative_parents.name: Chrysenes

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a phenanthrene (or its hydrogenated derivative) to which a hydroxyl group is attached.
alternative_parents.name: Phenanthrols

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a system of three linearly fused benzene rings.
alternative_parents.name: Anthracenes

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a methoxybenzene or a derivative thereof.
alternative_parents.name: Anisoles

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the alkyl aryl ether functional group with the generic formula R-O-R' , where R is an alkyl group and R' is an aryl group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyl aryl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Compounds containing a pyrene moiety, which consists four fused benzene rings, resulting in a flat aromatic system.
class.name: Pyrenes

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as benzopyrenes. These are organic compounds containing a benzene fused to a pyrene(benzo[def]phenanthrene) ring system.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing a benzene fused to a pyrene(benzo[def]phenanthrene) ring system.
direct_parent.name: Benzopyrenes

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing a benzene fused to a pyrene(benzo[def]phenanthrene) ring system.
subclass.name: Benzopyrenes

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
